title: immunoblotting (JMS protocol)
steps: determination of protein content by a bicinchoninic acid (BCA) assay
cell extracts containing 15 µg of total protein were separated on 4-15% sodium dodecyl sulfate-polyacrylamide gradient (150V, Bio-Rad) gels
electroblot gel onto polyvinylidene difluoride membrane
incubate membranes with 0.4 % volume paraformaldehyde for 00:15:00 for better protein binding
Block membranes with 5 Mass Percent milk for 00:30:00
incubate blot with primary antibody for 04:00:00, or overnight at 4°C
wash blot for 3 times for 00:05:00 with PBS- 0.1 % volume TRITON-X100
incubate for 01:00:00 with horseradish peroxidase-conjugated secondary antibody (Dako, Glostrup)
creator: Joris Van Asselberghs
